title: Watering Tips
description: Water your plants when the top soil feels dry. Avoid overwatering to prevent root rot and keep the roots healthy.

title: Sunlight Tips
description: Keep your plants in bright, indirect sunlight for several hours a day. Avoid exposing delicate plants to harsh direct sunlight to prevent leaf burn.

title: Fertilizing Tips
description: Fertilize your indoor plants once every two weeks during the growing season. Use a balanced fertilizer to promote healthy leaves and flowers.
